scheduling.alerts.content.Affiliate_Cosm: {{community_name}} is hosting a {{availability_name}} for the coveted **{[reward_items]}**! You can view more details by [joining]({[community_invite]}) their community.
scheduling.alerts.content.Boost_Event_Me: Assemble your crew and get ready to set sail — {[main_event_name]} is now live! You'll gain boosted reputation and gold for any activities related to {[boost_faction]}!
scheduling.alerts.content.Capture_a_Code: Deckhand Lootin' Lizalaroo is back with another Capture a Code competition on the forums! Snap a shot of **'{{theme_name}}'** and you'll have a chance to earn a variety of exclusive cosmetics.
scheduling.alerts.content.Community_Week: Raise your tankards and get ready for another community celebration! You can enjoy a boost on gold, reputation, renown, and [more]({{campaign_details_url}})!
The current **Community Event campaign** ends <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:R>! Make sure to login and complete all [deeds]({{campaign_details_url}}) before <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:f>.
scheduling.alerts.content.Ghoul_and_Glor: Summon your crew and raise the skeletons — a spooky new Ghoul & Glory Weekend has begun! You'll gain boosted reputation, gold, renown, and allegiance for all your dark deeds!
scheduling.alerts.content.Gold_Rush_Mess: Gold Rush is now active until <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:t>, <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:R>! All loot cashed in will enjoy a 1.5x multiplier — so grab that gold!
scheduling.alerts.content.Gold_and_Glory: Call your crew and throw a Voyage on the table — a new Gold & Glory Weekend is now live! You'll gain boosted reputation, gold, renown, and allegiance for all your high-sea hijinks!
scheduling.alerts.content.Insider_Reward: The current **Insider week** ends <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:R>! Make sure to earn enough reputation before <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:F>.
scheduling.alerts.content.Miscellaneous_: The current **Game Event campaign** ends <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:R>! Make sure to login and complete all [deeds]({campaign_resource_url}}) before <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:f>.
scheduling.alerts.content.Regular_Twitch: Tune in and watch [{{availability_name}}]({{campaign_resource_url}}) for a total of **{{total_rewards_watch_time_text}}** to earn all drops! Remember to link your Twitch account to Sea of Thieves and claim your drop once it's unlocked!
scheduling.alerts.content.Special_Twitch: Tune in and watch [{{availability_name}}]({{campaign_resource_url}}) to earn Twitch Drops! Remember to link your Twitch account to Sea of Thieves and claim your drop once it's unlocked!
scheduling.alerts.content.Twitch_Drop_Re: The current **Twitch Drops campaign** ends <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:R>! Make sure to [claim]({[twitch_inventory_url]}) your drops before <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:f>.
